overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk through a Los Santos neighborhood. The player starts at a residential corner with views of the downtown skyline, passes a detailed corner liquor store with pedestrians, and continues along mixed residential-commercial streets toward a busy intersection featuring a McDonald's.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street corner with downtown skyline view

events.description: white sedan drives past on the street from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward a corner store with the downtown skyline visible ahead

entered.detail: concrete wall with green and white graffiti tags
tall palm trees lining the residential street
cluster of modern glass skyscrapers visible in the distance
wooden telephone pole with multiple crossbars and wires
single-story stucco homes with pitched roofs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny residential street corner with a graffiti-covered wall on the right and palm trees lining the road. The camera walks forward along the concrete sidewalk, with the downtown skyline of modern skyscrapers visible in the distance. A white sedan passes by on the street as the camera approaches a corner store.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner liquor store with pedestrian activity

events.description: approaching the corner liquor store with visible signage and pedestrians
pedestrians come into view near the store entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the corner liquor store, navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in red jersey with number 11 walking toward the camera
woman in pink shirt standing near the store entrance looking at her phone

entered.detail: corner store with green painted walls and red awning
vertical sign reading FOOD MARKET with red lettering
red and white cigarette advertisement sign
malt liquor advertisements on the store windows
pair of black public payphones mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a corner liquor store with prominent Food Market and Marlboro signage. The sidewalk becomes narrower and more enclosed by the building. Pedestrians appear, including a man in a red sports jersey walking toward the camera and a woman in a pink shirt standing near the entrance. The downtown skyline shifts to the left as the camera rounds the corner.

events.description: camera slows to observe detailed storefront window advertisements and payphones
passing close by the woman in pink, temporarily blocking view of the street

agents.ego_description: moving slowly past the storefront, examining the window displays and advertisements, then passing the woman standing near the entrance

notable_agents.action: woman in pink shirt standing by the window looking at her phone

entered.detail: various advertisements and posters behind metal security grates
red and white ATM sign on the window

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly past the storefront, providing a close-up view of the window displays featuring various alcohol advertisements and an ATM sign. The woman in the pink shirt stands prominently near the entrance. The lighting becomes slightly darker in the shadow of the building as the camera passes the payphones and continues along the narrow sidewalk.

events.description: exiting the commercial corner into a more open residential area with houses and trees
approaching a pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past residential houses and palm trees, approaching a pedestrian walking in the same direction

notable_agents.action: man in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: white church with arched windows and red roof
bright yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge
green metal fence along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Leaving the store behind, the scene opens into a residential area with single-family homes, a white church on the right, and more abundant tree cover. The camera passes a yellow fire hydrant and continues along the cracked concrete sidewalk, approaching a pedestrian walking ahead. The environment feels more suburban with scattered palm trees and utility poles lining the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with fast food and retail

events.description: approaching a busy commercial intersection with traffic lights and recognizable fast food signage

agents.ego_description: approaching a busy intersection with groups of pedestrians waiting and walking

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing near the intersection corner

entered.detail: fast food restaurant with prominent golden arches and red signage
overhead traffic signal gantry spanning the intersection
large commercial billboards visible above the street
low-rise commercial buildings with various storefronts

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a wide commercial intersection featuring a prominent McDonald's on the left. The sidewalk opens up significantly, and more pedestrians appear near the crosswalk. Traffic lights and large billboards dominate the view ahead, marking a transition from the quiet residential area to a busier commercial zone. The downtown skyline is no longer visible as the camera focuses on the intersection ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk from a sunny residential street corner through a quiet neighborhood and into a bustling commercial intersection. It begins by moving along a sidewalk past graffiti-covered walls and palm trees, with the distant downtown skyline framing the view as a white sedan passes by. As the camera rounds a corner, the scene narrows into the shadow of a liquor store, passing pedestrians and detailed window advertisements before the environment opens back up into a suburban stretch of single-family homes and a white church. The camera then continues along a cracked sidewalk past a yellow fire hydrant and utility poles, gradually leaving the residential quiet behind. Finally, the view expands into a wide commercial zone dominated by a prominent McDonald's, traffic lights, and large billboards as the skyline disappears from sight.
